entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A type of pulse crop, also known as red gram, facing stagnant production and price increases in India.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where pigeonpea production is a concern and where the hybrid technology is being implemented.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-arid Tropics, co-developer of the hybrid pigeonpea breeding technology.

entities.name: ICAR
entities.description: Indian Council of Agriculture Research, co-developer of the hybrid pigeonpea breeding technology.

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: New technology developed by ICRISAT and ICAR to increase pigeonpea productivity.

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC NUCLEAR MALE-STERILITY
entities.description: The system used as the basis for the hybrid technology.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of pigeonpea, a key target for improvement.

entities.name: GTH 1
entities.description: An experimental hybrid pigeonpea variety yielding 32% more than GT 101.

entities.name: ICPH 2671
entities.description: An experimental hybrid pigeonpea variety resistant to fusarium wilt and sterility mosaic diseases, yielding 38% more than Maruti.

entities.name: GT 101
entities.description: A local pigeonpea variety used as a benchmark for yield comparison with GTH 1.

entities.name: MARUTI
entities.description: A popular pigeonpea variety used as a benchmark for yield comparison with ICPH 2671.

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A disease to which ICPH 2671 exhibits resistance.

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASES
entities.description: A disease to which ICPH 2671 exhibits resistance.

entities.name: PULSE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The overall production of pulse crops, expected to grow with the new hybrid pigeonpea.

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: A state in India where on-farm trials were conducted.

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: A state in India where on-farm trials were conducted.

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where on-farm trials were conducted.

entities.name: MADHYA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where on-farm trials were conducted.

entities.name: JHARKHAND
entities.description: A state in India where on-farm trials were conducted.

relationships.weight: ICRISAT co-developed the hybrid breeding technology.
ICAR co-developed the hybrid breeding technology.
The hybrid breeding technology is based on the CMS system.
The hybrid breeding technology aims to improve yield.
GTH 1 yields 32% more than GT 101.
ICPH 2671 yields 38% more than Maruti.
ICPH 2671 is resistant to fusarium wilt.
ICPH 2671 is resistant to sterility mosaic diseases.
Pigeonpea is grown and a concern in India.
GTH 1 was tested in Maharashtra.
GTH 1 was tested in Karnataka.
GTH 1 was tested in Andhra Pradesh.
GTH 1 was tested in Madhya Pradesh.
GTH 1 was tested in Jharkhand.
ICPH 2671 was tested in Maharashtra.
ICPH 2671 was tested in Karnataka.
ICPH 2671 was tested in Andhra Pradesh.
ICPH 2671 was tested in Madhya Pradesh.
ICPH 2671 was tested in Jharkhand.
The hybrid breeding technology is expected to impact pulse production.
